commonIssues:
Delays and confusion due to reliance on agents instead of direct procedures on Kaveri 2.0.

How to fix:

  • Use the official Kaveri 2.0 Portal for document data entry and slot booking directly.

Property mutation (Khata transfer) can be delayed by 12-24 months due to legal challenges from family members.

How to fix:

  • Ensure the registered Will clearly identifies all properties. Apply promptly at the BBMP/local authority with the Death Certificate and Will.

Wills are challenged over shaky signatures or mental soundness.

How to fix:

  • Always attach a medical certificate of "sound mind" from a registered practitioner and consider video-recording the Will signing.

Difficulties at local SROs regarding registering a Will after the testator's death.

How to fix:

  • Present the original Will, death certificate, and the witnesses to the Sub-Registrar. If refused, file an appeal under the Registration Act.

If witnesses cannot be located later or their credibility is challenged.

How to fix:

  • Choose younger, reliable witnesses with permanent addresses. Ensure their Aadhaar details and signatures are clearly recorded.
